name: Sweet Rolls (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle yeast over water in a large warm bowl. Stir until yeast is dissolved.
2. Add sugar, salt, anise seed, melted butter, eggs, and 2 cups of flour; beat until smooth.
3. Stir in enough additional flour to make a soft dough. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface; knead until smooth and elastic (8 to 10 minutes).
4. Put dough into a greased bowl; turn to grease the top. Cover; let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk (about 1 hour).
5. Punch dough down and turn onto a lightly floured surface. Roll into a 12-inch square.
6. Cut into fourths and cut each square into 4 triangles. Allow space for rising.
7. Place triangles on greased cookie sheets. Cover; let rise in warm place until doubled in bulk about 1 hour.
8. Beat egg yolk and corn syrup together until blended. Generously brush over triangles.
9. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 15 minutes. Serve warm.
